name: Path through multiple groups
description: Tests a transfer path that routes through multiple groups. Source is MetriTestSupergroup (1.1M CRC). Sink is a different group (1,108 members). Path should involve group collateralization from one group, then minting into another. Validates edge ordering with multiple collateral/mint sequences.
notes: Complex multi-group paths are highest risk for edge ordering bugs. Each group requires proper collateralize-then-mint sequence.
